info.name: RAM Helpdesk Tickets API
info.description:
API collection for retrieving Helpdesk tickets with RAM ID from Odoo.

## Authentication
All endpoints require Bearer token authentication.

## Setup
1. Set the `base_url` variable to your Odoo instance URL
2. Set the `api_token` variable to your configured API access token

## Endpoints
- GET /api/v1/helpdesk/tickets/ram - Get all RAM tickets with date filtering
- GET /api/v1/helpdesk/tickets/ram/:id - Get a specific RAM ticket by ID

variable.description: Your Odoo instance URL (e.g., http://localhost:8069 or https://your-odoo-domain.com)
API access token configured in Odoo System Parameters (top_ram_api.api_access_token)

request.description:
Retrieve all helpdesk tickets where ram_id is not empty.

**Response includes:**
- ram_id
- invid
- refund_reason
- workflow_level
- All related ticket data (stage, partner, user, dates, etc.)

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "count": 2,
    "date_from": null,
    "date_to": null,
    "tickets": [
        {
            "ram_id": "RAM-2026-001",
            "invid": "INV-2026-00123",
            "refund_reason": "Customer requested refund due to service issue",
            "workflow_level": "2",
            "workflow_level_display": "Level 2",
            "id": 1,
            "name": "Refund Request #001",
            "description": "Customer is requesting a full refund",
            "priority": "1",
            "create_date": "2026-01-15T10:30:00",
            "write_date": "2026-01-20T14:45:00",
            "stage_id": 2,
            "stage_name": "In Progress",
            "ticket_type_id": 28,
            "ticket_type_name": "Refund",
            "team_id": 1,
            "team_name": "Customer Support",
            "partner_id": 10,
            "partner_name": "John Doe",
            "partner_email": "john.doe@example.com",
            "partner_phone": "+1234567890",
            "user_id": 5,
            "user_name": "Support Agent",
            "sla_deadline": "2026-01-25T17:00:00",
            "sla_reached": false,
            "rating_last_value": 4.5,
            "tag_ids": [
                {"id": 1, "name": "Urgent"},
                {"id": 3, "name": "Refund"}
            ]
        }
    ]
}

item.name: Get RAM Tickets with Date Filter

request.description:
Retrieve helpdesk tickets with RAM ID, filtered by date range.

**Query Parameters:**
- `date_from` (optional): Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- `date_to` (optional): End date in YYYY-MM-DD format

query.description: Get all tickets from this date onwards

request.description: Retrieve all tickets created from a specific date onwards.

item.name: Get Single RAM Ticket by ID

request.description:
Retrieve a specific helpdesk ticket by its ID.

**Path Parameters:**
- `ticket_id`: The Odoo ticket ID (integer)

**Note:** Only returns tickets that have a non-empty ram_id
